basic_details.job_title: IIEST Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Engineering Science & Technology (IIEST), Shibpur
basic_details.short_information: The Indian Institute of Engineering Science & Technology (IIEST), Shibpur has released the Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 notification for 1 vacancy. Candidates with an M.Tech./M.E. in Aerospace Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, or an equivalent discipline can apply through email before 03 July 2026. The selection process includes a walk-in interview scheduled for 06 July 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 32 years Age Relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST/Woman and physically handicapped candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Tech./M.E. in Aerospace Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, or equivalent discipline
qualification.details: M.Tech./M.E. in Aerospace Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, or equivalent discipline from a recognized University/ Institute with minimum 60% marks or 6.5 CGPA on a 10-point scale with valid GATE/ NET. For SC/ST/PwD category, a minimum 55% marks or 6.0 CGPA on 10-point scale is required with valid GATE/NET. M.Tech./M.E. in Aerospace Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, or equivalent discipline from a recognized University/Institute with minimum 60% marks or 6.5 CGPA on a 10-point scale. For SC/ST/PwD category, a minimum 55% marks or 6.0 CGPA on 10-point scale.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 48100/- per month (with GATE/NET) or Rs. 40300/- per month (without GATE/NET)
salary_details.details: Project Associate I (with GATE/NET): Rs. 37,000/- + Rs. 11,100/- HRA (30%) = Rs. 48100/- per month Project Associate I (without GATE/NET): Rs. 31,000/- + Rs. 9,300/- HRA (30%) = Rs. 40300/- per month

selection_process: Walk-in interview Physical documents verification at the time of joining
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIEST Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 03-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download IIEST Project Associate I Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download IIEST Project Associate I Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIEST Project Associate - 1 recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 03-07-2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated email address by this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Associate - 1 post?
faq.answer: Candidates should have an M.Tech./M.E. in Aerospace Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, or an equivalent discipline with a minimum of 60% marks or 6.5 CGPA. Valid GATE/NET is also required for certain salary scales.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Associate - 1 position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for this position is 32 years. Age relaxation is provided for SC/ST/Woman and physically handicapped candidates.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate - 1 role?
faq.answer: The salary is Rs. 48100/- per month for candidates with GATE/NET and Rs. 40300/- per month for those without GATE/NET, inclusive of HRA.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for this IIEST recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted via email. You need to send soft copies of your application letter, bio-data, mark sheets, and certificates to the specified email address before the deadline.

faq.question: Q6. Is there a walk-in interview for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, a walk-in interview is scheduled for 06-07-2026. Candidates are advised to be present with all necessary documents.

faq.question: Q7. What documents are required to be submitted with the application?
faq.answer: You need to submit a self-attested copy of your application letter, recent bio-data, mark sheets, and relevant certificates. All documents should be self-attested.

faq.question: Q8. What is the total number of vacancies for Project Associate - 1?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Project Associate - 1 in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. Where is IIEST Shibpur located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Engineering Science & Technology (IIEST), Shibpur is located in Shibpur, West Bengal, with the pincode 711103.

faq.question: Q10. What is the nature of this job?
faq.answer: This is a project-based research job at IIEST Shibpur, focusing on a specific research project.
